cost.on_deploy_cost: <=3 beacons -> <=3 D1 writes per page view; RUM_SAMPLE lever + RUM_ENABLED off to stay within DIR-007 free tier (D1 100k writes/day)
cost.human_maintenance: RUM client + /api/rum endpoint + rumIngest validator + rum_cwv query tool + Node/browser tests + verifier + adversarial review

value.acceptance: PASS (verifier re-derives; query tool segments LCP/INP/CLS p75 by theme/route/device/network; browser proves the real client captures live CWV tagged by all four dimensions; the min-sample gate refuses to claim compliance without data)
value.user_value: once deployed, gives the Owner a way to SEE where the six-theme UI is slow (LCP/INP/CLS by theme, route, device and network) so the next perf work targets the real slow spots -- '先知道哪里慢，再优化'
value.realized_on_deploy: the pipeline is complete and byte-safe for the visual contract; a real p75 baseline lands only after deploy + field traffic (NOT_DEPLOYED now)

unknown_not_zero: there is NO real RUM baseline yet (NOT_DEPLOYED => no field data); the tool honestly returns insufficient_data rather than fabricate a 达标 claim. INP is a max-interaction-latency approximation, not spec INP (disclosed).
